default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content performance, operations, and upcoming changes.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carly Piekos (GrowthX) will become the primary contact in 2025, taking over from Carrie Chowske.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [A Webflow API key was granted to automate content staging, reducing manual CMS work and login conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [The content strategy for Concur will pivot from positioning it as a competitor to highlighting a new integration launching \~Feb 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
  - [The "Travel Trends & Tech" CMS field will be updated to show an empty state when no articles are selected, fixing a broken UI issue.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

## Topics

### Content & Performance Review

  - [**Overall Performance:** Sessions are up 55% and engagement is up 51% since mid-October, rebounding from a post-Thanksgiving dip.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Bet Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Expense Management:** "Policy Enforcement" is the top performer. "Receipt Chaos" shows strong growth, though from a small base.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Industry-Specific:** Energy/Utilities and Construction/Infrastructure content has more than doubled in sessions. New "Technology & Software" content has 224 sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [**Engagement Insights:** Bet content has fewer sessions but higher events-per-session than general guides, signaling stronger intent.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic is leveling off, possibly due to seasonality or increased competition among AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [**Concur Citations:** Citations are down, likely due to seasonality. This will be monitored in the new year to ensure rankings rebound.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)

### CMS & Workflow Improvements

  - [**Amplitude Tracking:** The CMS dropdown for content clusters now serves as the source for Amplitude tracking, replacing the Airtable list.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Action:** Notify Joel of any new clusters to add to the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**"Travel Trends & Tech" CMS Field:** This field is required but links to old, low-performing articles, causing broken UI.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [**Solution:** Joel will create a ticket for an empty state, allowing the field to be left blank without breaking the page.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Webflow API Integration:** An API key was granted to automate content staging.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**Permissions:** Read/write for CMS and Sites (for staging), and read-only for Assets (for screenshots).](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Reduces manual CMS work and prevents login conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### Strategic Alignment & Planning

  - [**Contract Renewal:** The 6-month contract renewal discussions will include Joel and Luke.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [**Concur Integration:** A new integration launching \~Feb 2025 will allow enterprise Concur users to access Engine's inventory and reporting from within Concur.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
      - [**Strategy Pivot:** Content will now position Concur as a platform that Engine *enhances*, not just an alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
  - [**Barry's Content:** Barry's content is complementary and not a priority over GrowthX's strategy. GrowthX will flag any conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**GrowthX Pilot Program:** Carrie will push to include Engine in a pilot for a new internal analytics tool to replace Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will consult James (Telescope) for feedback on his negative experience with the competitor tool, Peek.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [Review next week's content (4 editorial, 4 glossary) by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [Create a ticket for the "Travel Trends & Tech" empty state.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Send additional content for early review.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Update the Concur comparison article post-integration launch.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Notify Joel of new content clusters for the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Consult James (Telescope) for feedback on Peek.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Push to include Engine in the internal analytics tool pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)

## Meeting Schedule

  - [**Next Meeting:** In 3 weeks (Jan 8, 2025).](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)
  - [**Week of Jan 10:** Meeting may be async due to Joel's offsite.](https://fathom.video/share/g6eosnxmihT2zYN4WgXyaosqABzVTnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2366.0)

action_items.description: Review next week's 4 editorial + 4 glossary by 3:30; then Carrie schedules
Send extra content to Joel this week for pre-review
Note: send new clusters to Joel for CMS dropdown
Set up CMS API pipeline; stage only; notify Joel to enable publish
Refresh 'Best travel credit cards' article; coordinate redirect w/ Joel
Create ticket: add empty state to multi-ref 'Tech travel trends' (no 'Not found')
Email Marcel: intro James (Telescope) re: Peek feedback
Check if Concur comparison article published; if so, note to update post-launch
